title: Little Details You May Have Missed
display_title: Little Details You May Have Missed
wikitext:
[]: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Sep 10, 2018 9:04 pm A thread for any little details you've never noticed till now. (Merge this thread if anyone finds a better spot for it) Somehow I only just noticed that Misato's cross has a different design in EoE. In the series the hole for the necklace goes though the side of the cross, and in EoE it is through the front (obviously so Shinji can later nail it to Misato's grave marker). Ep. 1 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 11, 2018 9:08 am Was curious, so I took a look. Looks like it's inconsistent in the show, and they show the cord running through the sides and attaching to the top. This inconsistency continues into The End of Evangelion, and we first see the cord going through the front at 31:38, when Misato is trying to talk some sense into Shinji. The End of Evangelion at 31:38: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Sep 11, 2018 9:44 am It's kinda crazy to me that I've been at this for over 10 years now (on this board at least) and we're still picking up on new little details.

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Thu Sep 13, 2018 3:21 pm When Hyuga said in EoE during Unit 02 being dismembered by the Eva Series, "Berserker!", I always thought it was just some throwaway line that didn't mean a thing but only now when I saw it today and remembered all the times that Unit 01 went berserk did I finally see the light that Unit 02 might've been trying to go berserk but by then, it was too late. I feel both dumb and satisfied with my discovery in that it took two decades to discover it for myself.

Article: Little Details You May Have Missed
[]: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Mon Sep 10, 2018 9:04 pm A thread for any little details you've never noticed till now. (Merge this thread if anyone finds a better spot for it) Somehow I only just noticed that Misato's cross has a different design in EoE. In the series the hole for the necklace goes though the side of the cross, and in EoE it is through the front (obviously so Shinji can later nail it to Misato's grave marker). Ep. 1 SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Sep 11, 2018 9:08 am Was curious, so I took a look. Looks like it's inconsistent in the show, and they show the cord running through the sides and attaching to the top. This inconsistency continues into The End of Evangelion, and we first see the cord going through the front at 31:38, when Misato is trying to talk some sense into Shinji. The End of Evangelion at 31:38: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Tue Sep 11, 2018 9:44 am It's kinda crazy to me that I've been at this for over 10 years now (on this board at least) and we're still picking up on new little details.

[]: Re: Little Details You May Have Missed             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Thu Sep 13, 2018 3:21 pm When Hyuga said in EoE during Unit 02 being dismembered by the Eva Series, "Berserker!", I always thought it was just some throwaway line that didn't mean a thing but only now when I saw it today and remembered all the times that Unit 01 went berserk did I finally see the light that Unit 02 might've been trying to go berserk but by then, it was too late. I feel both dumb and satisfied with my discovery in that it took two decades to discover it for myself.
